questions.question: Consider a scheduling problem where you have 8 hours to complete a series of tasks. Each task can be completed in less than 8 hours. Using optimization techniques, determine the most efficient way to allocate your 8 hours to complete all tasks. What is the name of the optimization technique used in this scenario?

A company has 8 hours to launch a new product and wants to allocate the time among three tasks: marketing (2 hours), product development (3 hours), and sales (3 hours). Using optimization techniques, determine the optimal allocation of time to maximize the launch's success. What is the constraint on the total time available?

In a production planning problem, you have 8 hours to produce 240 units of a product. Each unit requires 0.5 hours to produce. Using optimization techniques, determine the optimal production time to minimize production time. What is the objective function used in this scenario?
questions.hint: Minimize production time, Objective function: Minimize (0.5x), where x is the total production time
